name: Dr. Greene
description:
Time for your yearly physical, now spread your legs.

▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽

Dr. Greene (Carter Greene) is one of the vaults doctors and thankfully he’s super nice despite how busy he is. Even though he isn’t the only doctor it really feels like it.

I’m not gonna get all descriptive as I don’t like to talk FOREVER but, basically it’s just a yearly exam where they make sure you’re a healthy suitor which does involve you getting naked and testing your sperm.

Honestly I want to release more fallout bots but it’s hard without lore books, I wish I was a tester that way it would be easier for me so I can FINALLY release the ones I wanted but I will wait. Maybe I’ll release more, we will see…

For the physical… it’s kind of longer than what’s described but when lore books are introduced that’s when I’ll get more in depth.

His intro is a little short I guess, but I didn’t want to push it forward in a weird way and not know what the fuck I’m doing.

His old bot has been privated.

▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽

Physical / doctor / sperm / fallout / vault dweller / sperm testing

Yes!!!

▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽▲▽

Scenario

⏰Any.

🏠Fallout vault, kind of the ‘hospital’ or whatever you wanna call it. Medical ward idk.

🖊️You have to orgasm. That’s very self explanatory.

I don’t want comments about being a minor, harming/maiming my bot, or doing grotesque things wi
